eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN ADMINISTRATIVE MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Maricopa, AZ; Arizona; at 07:33 PM ON APR 3, 2026 Effective until 03:33 AM APR 4, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: A SAFE Alert has been issued for Pima County. This is the Arizona Department of Public Safety. The Tucson Police is looking for 78 year old Kent Feller wearing a royal blue t shirt, black sweatpants, and black or navy blue Sketcher shoes, last seen driving his 2000, Nissan Frontier pick up, AZ License 505EHZ If you have contact with this SAFE Alert, please call 911. Monitor TV and Radio for updates.
